title: GodItems
description: An RPG plugin that adds custom items with abilities to the game
body:
An RPG plugin that adds new customizable items with abilities to the game.  This is the successor of the original GodItems plugin that adds all the legacy content with a ton of new functionalities.  Alternate links where you can also access the legacy version (Up to Minecraft 1.20.1) [Bukkit](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/goditems), [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/goditems)

# Main Functionalities
- Custom Items with custom abilities to enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience
- All item names and abilities fully configurable to match your world's RPG theme
- Custom charms(jewellery) system with custom charms that are equipped in a separate inventory and upgrade the weapon's abilities
- Custom armor sets that give powerful aura effects if the whole set is worn
- Party system that disables friendly fire and protects your friends from AOE abilities
- Custom items are protected from lava, fire and cactus damage
- All custom items are updated every time their configuration is updated to allow real-time control for server admins
- Compatibility with WorldGuard to disable custom item use in selected regions
- Custom drop from the Ender Dragon, Elder Guardians and (in the future) other Minecraft bosses to make boss fights more meaningful
- Some items are craftable with custom ingredients, some can only be obtained from naturally spawned chests


# Planned Updates
- Update item obtaining.  Currently, all items are found in naturally generated chests. In the future, that will be disabled in favour of more unique and challenging systems, mostly by defeating custom and vanilla Minecraft bosses.
- Add custom bosses that drop the items

# Wiki
There is an official wiki for the plugin at [https://goditems.fandom.com/wiki/GodItems_Wiki](https://goditems.fandom.com/wiki/GodItems_Wiki)

# Discord 
Join our discord channel to get help with using the plugin and report bugs. [Discord](https://discord.gg/6jCTNmFVAW)

# Patreon
If you like our work, support us on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/goditems), where you will get more frequent updates and a version of the plugin with custom textures for handheld items.  All content is available for free on this page or on our curseforge page.
